name: @harikrut/hk-media-optimizer
description: Lightweight, batch-based scanner that finds unused media files in your Media Library and lets you safely review and delete them.
author: Harikrut Technolab

scripts.makepot: wpi18n makepot --domain-path languages --pot-file hk-media-optimizer.pot --main-file hk-media-optimizer.php --exclude vendor,node_modules,dist
